tool.name: import_sarif
tool.description:
Parse a SARIF 2.1 file (Semgrep / CodeQL / Bandit / Snyk / Checkmarx) and register findings into engagement state.
Use at scan start for white-box engagements where client provided existing SAST output. Dynamic agents pick up each UNCONFIRMED finding and attempt to exploit it against running app — classic static-dynamic correlation.
